title: Student Prompt
front: Answer each question privately. After marking, calculate accuracy within each confidence band.
back: Do not allow lookup; the point is calibration, not trivia mastery.

title: Question 1
front: Which planet is closest to the Sun?

title: Question 2
front: What is the capital city of Canada?

title: Question 3
front: Which is heavier: a kilogram of feathers or a kilogram of steel?
teacher_use: Answer key: Neither — they weigh the same

title: Question 4
front: In which year did the Berlin Wall fall?

title: Question 5
front: What is the chemical symbol for potassium?

title: Question 6
front: Which country has the longest coastline in the world?

title: Question 7
front: How many bones are in the adult human body?

title: Question 8
front: What is the only mammal capable of true sustained flight?

title: Question 9
front: Which has more letters: the Greek alphabet or the modern English alphabet?
teacher_use: Answer key: English alphabet — 26 vs Greek 24

title: Question 10
front: Without looking it up, what is the 19th digit after the decimal point in pi?
